title: ctenopteris randallii
intro: Ctenopteris randallii, also known as Randall's fern or Randall's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Ctenopteris randallii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
